bird.name: Gold-ringed tanager
bird.summary: The gold-ringed tanager (Bangsia aureocincta) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae, endemic to Colombia. It is a plump, relatively…

locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

locations.name: 哥倫比亞西部山脈
locations.summary: 哥倫比亞西部山脈（西班牙語：Cordillera Occidental），是哥倫比亞的山脈，屬於安第斯山脈的一部分，全長1,200公里，面積86,239平方公里，平均海拔高度2,000米，最高點海拔高度4,250米。

relations.subject: Gold-ringed tanager
relations.evidence: It inhabits a narrow band of high-altitude cloud forest on the slopes of the western cordillera of the Andes, where it survives on a diet of fruit and insects

relations.subject: Gold-ringed tanager
relations.evidence: It inhabits a narrow band of high-altitude cloud forest on the slopes of the western cordillera of the Andes, where it survives on a diet of fruit and insects

relations.subject: Gold-ringed tanager
relations.evidence: It is considered a vulnerable species, threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Gold-ringed tanager
relations.evidence: Deforestation, primarily the clearing of land for small-scale agriculture, road-building, and an increase in artisanal mining have been identified as the main threats to this species
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
